textByHashes.de77dc7495862aecc1fb67f97d2de94818fb6dbd: Hello there! I am known as the Makeover Mage! I have spent many years researching magics that can change your physical appearance!
textByHashes.b6e3fef09f1adf4b7dc2c7298e2e29a1d208f23d: I can alter your physical form with my magic, there's no fee. Would you like me to perform my magics upon you?
textByHashes.7fc913f5f4aacdf426159ae1a88e6ab633a41989: Into a goblin? What do you want to turn into a goblin for?
textByHashes.9b8d2f43ab7a0c6ecc575116467b1f61f392f3aa: I think I know how, but I've never deliberately transmogrified someone into another species before. It's a very risky procedure, and I don't want to be held responsible if it goes wrong.
textByHashes.e48a8c93a5790314a563ab61209192db56dc9c71: How about I tell you the recipe so you can make the potion yourself. It's not too complex. You'll just need to take a toadflax potion and add some pharmakos berries.
textByHashes.4f6788bdc58018a548d2e12ba59929c5a41260d3: That's right. They're quite rare, but have wonderful properties that help with transmogrification. Luckily, I grow plenty right outside. Feel free to take some.
textByHashes.ca092f8c1560676f28b840cc5475c458c9e7c2a1: Now, once you've made the potion, remember that the transformation is very delicate. It will reverse itself if you are in direct sunlight or if you perform a strenuous activity like fighting.
textByHashes.b2bc2d5e5d3a6cfca7303f738d84ea9d31578b4b: For that reason, you should only drink it in the area where you're going to need it. I'd also suggest you take off any pieces of armour or similar before drinking it, just in case the transformation damages them.
textByHashes.6beba677bb95031f1eaa2b70e0d648323c95bdf0: What a strange thing to want to turn into.
textByHashes.a39d1c46dec4a7db8909738756d0c1da3d26b1af: You can do it yourself using that potion I told you about. Just take a toadflax potion and add some pharmakos berries.
textByHashes.40413da89fd7837eb8d7082d1697327536bc4ebd: Why, of course! Basically, and I will try and explain this so that you will understand it correctly,
textByHashes.5c7c8c54aeedf750977685fd51496bebaa8ba27c: I use my secret magical technique to melt your body down into a puddle of its elements.
textByHashes.26564033ad8266b8e7cbff3b9e4ebef5f258323d: When I have broken down all trace of your body, I then rebuild it into the form I am thinking of!
textByHashes.6ca312c585b2e69211cbb8aadee58c4f5ad1c285: Or, you know, somewhere vaguely close enough anyway.
textByHashes.cdc541899a2f1c511a12a0874863deecf50e2916: It's as safe as houses! Why, I have only had thirty-six major accidents this month!
textByHashes.7cc87bbb908db9514027d4a1905c4162e1e3e0bb: So what do you say? Feel like a change? There's no fee.
textByHashes.dfcae214f16d6b7545936928752a8e3c06714e9b: Good choice, good choice. You wouldn't want to carry on looking like that, I'm sure!
textByHashes.14210ade844a1deaca4508b44be9899a3f4a6d21: Hmm... you didn't feel any unexpected growths anywhere around your head just then did you?
textByHashes.42076700cc5ef0131d21a192b5dbc235a1dc8c87: Good, good! I was worried for a second there!
textByHashes.306ca28eeed507e9e35a5b812c8b937747791f69: Nothing! It's all fine! You seem alive anyway!
textByHashes.23825839e1c7a5dc62cc7cf32cab233d0eac8eac: Two arms... two legs... one head... it seems that spell finally worked okay!
textByHashes.6bd4cdce865e202414da304cc55a8bd654b91b89: No problem, but please remember that the amulet I will sell you is only a copy of my own. It contains no magical powers, and as such will only cost you 100 coins.
textByHashes.facbeac006dfa4b85e1fda496f93b42bb5dc81ec: Anyway, would you like me to alter your physical form? For you, I'll do it for free!
textByHashes.9ea5ccc0ec096faaeda90c9de3af4beefa58f107: That's fair enough, my jewellery is not to everyone's taste.
